classified.text: Good afternoon.
Thank you for calling Grand Horizon Resort's Guest Relations.
My name is Julian.
How may I assist you with your travel plans today?
Good afternoon, Julian.
This is Dr. Rachel speaking.
I have a reservation at your Kuala Lumpur property starting tonight,
but my international flight has just been delayed by 12 hours.
I am going to miss my first night, and I wanted to know if it's possible to adjust my check-in date.
Oh, I am so sorry to hear about your flight delay, Dr. Rachel.
Travel disruptions can be incredibly exhausting.
Please rest assured that I am more than happy to help you adjust your reservation so you don't lose your booking.
May I please have your reservation confirmation number?
Thank you so much, Julian. I appreciate your kindness.
Yes, my confirmation number is GHR44921.
Thank you very much. Please hold for just a brief moment while I access our reservation database.
I am pulling up your details right now.
Take your time, Julian. Thank you.
Thank you for waiting, Dr. Rachel.
I see you're booking for a deluxe King Suite for four nights.
Because this was a promotional, non-refundable rate, the system usually locks the dates automatically.
However,
given your flight situation, I am going to manually override the penalty and shift your check -in date to tomorrow.
Oh, that is absolutely wonderful news.
I was quite worried I would be charged for a room I couldn't use.
Will I still be able to keep the full four nights, or will the stay be shortened?
I have checked our availability, and luckily, the suite is free for an extra night at the end of your stay.
So, I have successfully shifted your entire four-night block.
Your new checkout date will be this coming Wednesday instead of Tuesday, at no extra charge.
Wow, that is incredibly generous of you.
I honestly expected a lot of corporate red tape, but you have made this entire process completely stress-free.
It is entirely our pleasure, Dr. Rachel.
Our priority is ensuring your stay with us is perfect, right from the moment you travel.
I have also added a note to the front desk team to expect a late morning arrival for you tomorrow,
so your room will be fully prepped and ready.
Excellent. That sounds absolutely perfect.
Thank you so much for your stellar efficiency and wonderful customer service today, Julian.
You've truly turned my day around.
You are most welcome, Dr. Rachel.
It was an absolute pleasure assisting you.
I have just sent the updated booking confirmation to your email.
Safe travels on your flight tonight, and we look forward to welcoming you tomorrow.
Have a great afternoon.

call_summary.outcome: The customer service agent successfully adjusted the customer's reservation, shifting their check-in date to the next day and maintaining their full four-night stay at no extra charge

classified.text: Emergency Home Restoration and Plumbing Hotline. My name is Marcus.
What is the nature of your emergency today?
Help! I just got home and my entire living room is flooded. Water is literally gushing out from under the kitchen sink like a fountain.
It's ruining the hardwood floors. Oh my god, what do I do?
Ma 'am, please take a deep breath.
I'm here to help you and we are going to stop the water together.
First,
can I get your name and your current address so I can get a technician moving to you right now?
My name is Clara. Clara Jenkins. I'm at 425 Pine Street.
Please tell them to hurry. The water is already spreading into the hallway. It's reaching the power outlets.
Clara, I have dispatched our emergency team to 425 Pine Street. They will be there in 15 minutes.
Right now, I need you to stay away from those power outlets. Is it safe for you to walk over to the main water shutoff valve?
The main valve? I think it's in the basement or outside near the garage. I've never had to touch it before. I don't know what it looks like.
Don't worry, Clara. Walk over towards the garage or basement steps safely. Look for a bright red wheel or a blue lever on a pipe coming straight out of the wall.
Do you see anything like that?
Wait. I'm checking the basement door area now.
Okay, yes, there is a pipe near the water heater with a big red circular handle. Is that it?
Yes, that is exactly it. Perfect job, Clara. Now, I want you to turn that red handle clockwise. Turn it all the way to the right until it tightens and won't turn anymore.
That will shut off the water supply to the whole house.
Okay, it's really stiff.
Wait. Okay, I'm turning it. It stopped turning.
Let me look upstairs.
Oh, thank goodness the gushing sound under the sink just stopped.
Brilliant.
You did an amazing job, Clara. The active flooding has completely stopped. Now leave that valve exactly as it is. Can you confirm if any water actually got inside the electrical outlets?

No, it looks like it stopped just a few inches short of the hallway sockets. It's just a massive puddle on the floor now. Wow, my heart is beating so fast. Thank you so much for walking me through that.

You're very welcome, Clara. You reacted incredibly fast, and you just saved your home from much worse damage. Our restoration truck is only about 10 minutes away from your location now. They will handle the water extraction and dry out your floors completely.
Okay, great. I will just wait by the front door for them to arrive. Thanks again, Marcus. I really appreciate your calm voice.
It's my pleasure, Clara.
Hang tight, stay safe, and the team will see you shortly. Have a better rest of your day.

classified.text: Thank you for calling Silver Lining Insurance.
My name is Marcus.
To whom do I have the pleasure
of speaking today?
Hi, Marcus. This is Sarah Jenkins.
I'm calling because a rock hit my
windshield on the highway this morning, and now there's a massive crack.
I'm sorry to hear that,
Sarah. I'm glad you're safe. Do you have your policy number handy so I can pull up your glass
coverage details?
Yes, just a second.
It's 44920 Alpha. I'm really worried because I have a long
road trip planned for tomorrow, and I need this fixed immediately.
I understand the urgency.
Looking at your premier plan, you are fully covered for glass repair with a $0 deductible.
I can schedule a mobile technician to come to your location this afternoon.
Oh, that would be a huge relief.
Does it matter that I'm at my office and not at home?
Not at all. We just need the vehicle's location and a contact number.
Shall I proceed with the booking for the 2 p.m. slot?
Yes, please. That works perfectly for me. Thank you so much for making this easy.
It's my pleasure, Sarah. I'm processing that now. You'll receive a confirmation text shortly.
Is there anything else I can assist you with today?

classified.text: Hello.
Thank you for being a valued Horizon Mobile customer. My name is Chloe. Am I speaking with Jason today?
Yeah, this is Jason.
Look, if this is a sales call, I'm really not interested. I'm quite happy with my current phone plan.
I completely understand, Jason. Your time is valuable, and I promise I won't waste it.
I'm actually looking at your account data usage over the past three months, and I noticed you've been hitting your data limit early every single month.
Yeah, well, that's because my kids use my hotspot when we are out. I just pay the extra overage charges on the bill. It's fine. I really don't need a more expensive plan.

That's exactly why I'm calling. What if I told you that you could get completely unlimited high-speed data plus a free streaming subscription for $5 less than what you are currently paying with those extra charges?
Wait,
less? How is it less?
Usually these upgrades end up costing me way more after a few months. Is there a hidden catch here?
No catch at all, Jason. Because you've been a loyal customer with us for over three years, you qualify for our Loyalty Unlimited tier.
Your current bill averages $60 due to those extra data fees. This upgrade is a flat $55 a month, locked in for two years.
Huh.
$55 fixed? And you said it comes with a streaming subscription?
Which one is it?
Yes. It includes a free standard Netflix subscription for as long as you keep the plan. So you'd actually save on your phone bill and stop paying for Netflix separately if you already have it.
Wow. Okay. We actually do pay for Netflix separately right now. So that would save us another $15.
Honestly, that sounds like a pretty good deal.

It really is one of our best exclusive offers. I can apply this change to your account right now, and the unlimited data will kick in immediately for your family. Would you like me to go ahead with that?
Yeah. Let's do it. Might as well save some money and stop worrying about the kids using up all the data.

Perfect. I've just updated your account, and you'll receive a confirmation email with your new details and your Netflix activation link in a few minutes. Thank you so much for your time, Jason, and have a wonderful day.
Thank you.

call_summary.summary: The agent analyzed the customer's account and offered an upgrade to an unlimited data plan with a free streaming subscription for a lower monthly fee than the customer's current plan with overage charges.

classified.text: Good afternoon.
Thank you for calling Velvet Glow Beauty Care. My name is Chloe. How may I add a
little radiance to your day today? Good afternoon, Chloe. I hope you're having a lovely day.
I'm calling because I noticed a discrepancy on my bank statement this morning. I am a subscriber
to your premium gold skincare box, which is $90 a month, but I was charged twice this month for
a total of $180.
Could you help me look into this error?
Sigh. Well, our system processes
thousands of transactions flawlessly every day, ma'am, so it's highly unlikely to be a system
error on our end. You probably just clicked the submit order button twice on our checkout page
during your monthly renewal, or your banking app refreshed abnormally. The double charge is almost
certainly your own doing. Oh, I see.
However, my account is set to automatic renewal, so I didn't
actually manually check out or press any buttons this month. Both charges have the exact same
transaction timestamp. Could you please pull up my profile and check if the duplicate payment can
be refunded back to my card? Look, I am looking at your profile right now, and I really don't have
time to deep dive into your personal banking history. All sales on our premium boxes are
strictly final and non-refundable. It's clearly stated in our terms of service. If you have an
issue with your bank showing two charges, you need to go complain to your bank, not to us.
Chloe, there is no need to be defensive or use that tone with me. I am asking a very standard question
as a loyal subscriber. The bank confirmed the funds went directly to your company under two
identical invoice numbers. I am simply asking for a supervisor or a billing specialist to review this
so we can resolve the mistake politely. And I'm telling you that my supervisor is incredibly busy
preparing for a massive product launch, and she definitely doesn't have the time to sit down
and audit a single $90 charge for you. It's just $90 for luxury skincare, ma'am. If this minor
amount is causing such a massive crisis for your budget, maybe luxury subscriptions aren't right for
you. My financial situation is absolutely none of your business, Chloe, and that comment was
incredibly disrespectful.
The amount is a matter of principle and corporate honesty. Since you are
actively refusing to assist me or transfer me to a manager,
please provide your full name and your
employee ID number right now.
Go right ahead and get offended, ma 'am. My name is Chloe. You can spell
it exactly how it sounds. I don't have an employee ID number to give you because our corporate data is
confidential. Feel free to send a long email to our support inbox if it makes you feel better,
but it's just going to get filtered out anyway. I am honestly stunned by your lack of professionalism.
This is easily the most hostile customer service experience I have ever had. I will be contacting
your corporate headquarters directly, and I will also file a formal dispute through my credit card
company for unauthorized billing.
Go ahead and dispute it with your credit card company. Do whatever
you want, ma'am. If you file a chargeback, our system will automatically blacklist your account
and cancel your subscription permanently anyway. We have plenty of VIP clients waiting for that spot,
so you won't be missed at all. That is perfectly fine with me, as I have absolutely no desire to
support a brand that treats people this way. This call is recorded on your network, and I am confident
your upper management will be appalled when they review your behavior. Goodbye, Chloe. I really
couldn't care less about your threats or your recordings, ma'am. I have actual clients on my
other line who don't waste my entire afternoon over $90.
Enjoy your bank dispute. Goodbye.
Good afternoon.

classified.text: Thank you for calling Nexus Stream Support. My name is David. How can I provide you with
excellent service today?
Hi, David. I'm calling because my bell just came out and it's $30
higher than usual. I just wanted to check if there was a mistake or a glitch on my account.
I can certainly check that for you. Let me pull up your account.
Ah, I see here that your 12-month promotional discount has ended,
so your account has reverted to our standard corporate pricing tier.
Oh, I see. I didn't receive any email warning me that the price was going to jump that much.
Is there any way I can renew the promotional rate or maybe sign up for a different package?
Well, the expiration date was clearly printed in bold on your original contract, sir.
We don't send out individual reminders to every single person.
If you wanted a cheaper plan, you should have called us before the deadline.
Right, but life gets busy and I missed it.
$30 is just a big jump for my budget.
Is there a supervisor or a retention specialist I could speak with to see if we can work something
out?
Look, a supervisor is just going to tell you the exact same thing I just did.
Transferring you is just wasting their time and mine. It's really not that hard to read your
own monthly statements, you know.
Excuse me?
Wow, there is absolutely no need
to be condescending. I am just asking a simple question about my options as a customer.
And I'm giving you a simple answer. You enjoyed a cheap discount for a whole year and now you have
to pay normal price like everyone else. That's how a business works. I can't just hand out freebies
because you forgot to check your emails.
This is completely unacceptable behavior for a support
agent. What is your full name and employee ID number? I am absolutely reporting this attitude
to your corporate office. Go right ahead. Look it up on your online portal. If you can find it,
that is, since you seem to have trouble reading basic information on your screen anyway.
I don't have time to hold your hand through a standard contract.
Unbelievable!
You know what? Cancel my service right now. I am not paying a single cent more
to a company that employs people like you.
Perfect. Consider it canceled. Let me press
the button for you so you can go complain somewhere else. Have a wonderful day.

classified.text: Thank you for calling Global Connect Premium Support.
My name is Marcus.
To whom do I have the pleasure of speaking today?
Hi, Marcus.
This is Sarah Jenkins.
I'm calling because I noticed a double charge on my credit card statement this morning for my monthly subscription.
I'm very sorry to hear that, Ms. Jenkins.
I certainly understand how frustrating unexpected charges can be.
Let me pull up your account profile.
Could you please verify the last four digits of the card on file?
Sure. It's 4492.
Thank you. Just a moment while the system refreshes.
Okay. I see the two charges of $45.
It looks like the first one was a system-generated renewal and the second was a manual trigger.
Oh, that's strange. I didn't manually trigger anything.
Can we get that second one refunded today?
Well,
looking at the logs, the request came from your IP address, Ms. Jenkins.
Our policy generally states that manual overrides are non-refundable.
Wait. I'm sorry?
I definitely didn't do that.
I was asleep at 3 a.m. when that charge went through.
Is there a supervisor I could talk to?
Look, Sarah, a supervisor is going to tell you the exact same thing I just did.
Do you think I'm just making this up for fun?
Excuse me? I'm just asking for a correction on a mistake your system made.
There's no need for that tone.
My tone?
Honestly, I'm tired of people calling in and playing dumb about their own mistakes.
If you're that desperate for the money, maybe you shouldn't have a premium subscription in the first place.
I cannot believe you just said that.
Give me your employee ID number right now.
How about no?
How about you just hang up and stop wasting my time?
I've got actual customers with real problems.
Goodbye, Sarah.
Goodbye.

classified.text: Good afternoon.
Welcome to Horizon Airways Customer Care. My name is Elena. How may I assist you today?
You can assist me by firing whoever's running your joke of an airline.
My flight to London was just cancelled and some useless automated text told me I have to wait
until tomorrow.
Do you have any idea who I am or how much money I lose because of your incompetence?
I completely understand your frustrations, sir. And I am incredibly sorry for the massive
disruption to your travel plans. The cancellation was due to a severe thunderstorm over the Atlantic,
which triggered a safety grounding.
Let me look at your booking right away to see how we can get
you to London safely.
May I have your ticket or a last name? I don't care about a little rain.
Other airlines are taking off, so your pilots are clearly just lazy. My name is Arthur Vance.
Look it up. I am a Platinum Elite Flyer, and I demand you put me on a private charter
or buy me a first-class seat on a British Airways flight right now.
I thank you, Mr. Vance. I have pulled up your Platinum profile. I see the urgency,
especially with your elite status.
Regarding other airlines, all transatlantic routes are currently
blocked by air traffic control for safety, so British Airways is grounded as well. However,
because you are a priority member, I am looking at alternative routing options through our European
hubs. Oh, so now you want me to do a layover?
Brilliant! Truly spectacular service. I pay thousands
of dollars a year to fly direct,
not to sit in some secondary airport eating stale sandwiches because
your company can't handle a thunderstorm.
You are completely useless.
I know. A connection is far from ideal when you paid for a direct flight, Mr. Vance,
and I apologize for that. However, I have found a rerouting option through Paris that departs in
exactly two hours. It will get you to London tonight, just four hours later than your original arrival
time. I can upgrade your seat to first class for that entire journey at no extra charge.
Two hours? So I have to sit in this crowded terminal for another two hours because of you?
Fine. Whatever. Just book it. But you better ensure my luggage actually makes it onto that plane,
or I will sue this entire airline. I am processing the first class ticket through Paris right now,
Mr. Vance. I am also manually tagging your baggage in the system to ensure it is personally transferred
by our priority ground crew during your connection. You won't have to recheck it yourself.
Hmm.
Wow. That's the bare minimum you should be doing anyway. Give me my new boarding passes. I
don't have all day to stand here watching you click buttons.
Here are your updated boarding passes for both flights, Mr. Vance. Your gate is B-12,
and priority boarding will begin in 45 minutes. I have also issued a complimentary $50 airport
lounge voucher to your email so you can wait comfortably.
Grab the papers. I'm going to the lounge. Just make sure the plane actually flies this time.
We will do everything we can, sir.
Thank you for your patience.
Safe travels to London, and have a good afternoon.
Good afternoon.

transcript_m2.text: Good afternoon.
Welcome to Horizon Airways Customer Care. My name is Elena. How may I assist you today?
You can assist me by firing whoever's running your joke of an airline.
My flight to London was just cancelled and some useless automated text told me I have to wait
until tomorrow.
Do you have any idea who I am or how much money I lose because of your incompetence?
I completely understand your frustrations, sir. And I am incredibly sorry for the massive
disruption to your travel plans. The cancellation was due to a severe thunderstorm over the Atlantic,
which triggered a safety grounding.
Let me look at your booking right away to see how we can get
you to London safely.
May I have your ticket or a last name? I don't care about a little rain.
Other airlines are taking off, so your pilots are clearly just lazy. My name is Arthur Vance.
Look it up. I am a Platinum Elite Flyer, and I demand you put me on a private charter
or buy me a first-class seat on a British Airways flight right now.
I thank you, Mr. Vance. I have pulled up your Platinum profile. I see the urgency,
especially with your elite status.
Regarding other airlines, all transatlantic routes are currently
blocked by air traffic control for safety, so British Airways is grounded as well. However,
because you are a priority member, I am looking at alternative routing options through our European
hubs. Oh, so now you want me to do a layover?
Brilliant! Truly spectacular service. I pay thousands
of dollars a year to fly direct,
not to sit in some secondary airport eating stale sandwiches because
your company can't handle a thunderstorm.
You are completely useless.
I know. A connection is far from ideal when you paid for a direct flight, Mr. Vance,
and I apologize for that. However, I have found a rerouting option through Paris that departs in
exactly two hours. It will get you to London tonight, just four hours later than your original arrival
time. I can upgrade your seat to first class for that entire journey at no extra charge.
Two hours? So I have to sit in this crowded terminal for another two hours because of you?
Fine. Whatever. Just book it. But you better ensure my luggage actually makes it onto that plane,
or I will sue this entire airline. I am processing the first class ticket through Paris right now,
Mr. Vance. I am also manually tagging your baggage in the system to ensure it is personally transferred
by our priority ground crew during your connection. You won't have to recheck it yourself.
Hmm.
Wow. That's the bare minimum you should be doing anyway. Give me my new boarding passes. I
don't have all day to stand here watching you click buttons.
Here are your updated boarding passes for both flights, Mr. Vance. Your gate is B-12,
and priority boarding will begin in 45 minutes. I have also issued a complimentary $50 airport
lounge voucher to your email so you can wait comfortably.
Grab the papers. I'm going to the lounge. Just make sure the plane actually flies this time.
We will do everything we can, sir.
Thank you for your patience.
Safe travels to London, and have a good afternoon.

classified.text: Good afternoon.
Thank you for calling SkyPass Travel Solutions.
My name is Fiona.
How may I assist you with your flight booking today?

Finally! I've been on hold for 20 minutes. Listen, Fiona, I just got an alert saying my flight to Chicago tomorrow morning was changed from 10 a.m. to 7 a.m. This is completely unacceptable. I am not waking up at 4 in the morning just because you're company.
I am so sorry for the surprise schedule change, ma 'am. I completely understand that a three -hour shift is incredibly inconvenient.
Let me look at your booking right away so I can...

Fine. They better be there when I land. Now, what about my seat assignment? I originally paid extra for an aisle seat in row 5 because I need to get off the plane quickly for my meeting. If you put me in a middle seat at the back of the plane, I'm going to be absolutely...
I completely understand.

I have just clicked Send, Regina. The new United Airlines e-ticket and confirmation code should be hitting your inbox in about 30 seconds. I highly recommend checking your spam folder, just in case it takes a moment to route through.

classified.text: Hello? Is anyone actually working over there?
I paid for overnight express shipping for a designer dress.
The tracking says delivered, but I have absolutely nothing.
Your courier company is either completely incompetent or they stole my package.
Good afternoon. I am so sorry to hear that you haven't received your package yet.
I can certainly look into this for you right away. May I please have your...
I don't need you to apologize. I need you to find my dress.
My name is Victoria.
I have a gala tonight and I am not going to miss it
because your people don't know how to drop off a box. Fix this right now.
I understand the urgency, Victoria. Let me pull up the delivery details.
Could you please provide your order reference number so I can check the exact GPS tracking drop-off?
It is LX9942.
It says it was signed for at noon today.
That is a blatant lie because I have been sitting in my living room all day and nobody even rang the bell.
Thank you for the number. Let me check the system.
Okay, I see the delivery confirmation and the photo receipt attached by the driver.
Victoria, it looks like it was delivered to Unit 4B at 120 Oak Avenue.
Wait, what did you just say? Unit 4B? Are you joking?
I live in Unit 12A. Why on earth would your driver blindly leave a luxury item at a completely different apartment number?
I see the confusion, Victoria, but I am looking at the original invoice submitted during checkout.
The address entered on the order form explicitly lists Unit 4B, 120 Oak Avenue.
The driver was simply following the exact address provided to us.
Unit 4B.
That's… oh, that is my old apartment.
Well, your website's autofill system must have glitched and selected my old address.
A well-designed system should have flagged that my billing address didn't match.
Our system does register multiple addresses under your profile, so it is possible the older one was selected by mistake.
Fortunately,
since it is in the same building, I can immediately call the building concierge and have them retrieve the package from Unit 4B and bring it up to Unit 12A.
Is there anything else I can assist you with today?
No, that's all.
Just make sure your system doesn't mess up my profile next time.
Goodbye.
Goodbye.

classified.text: Oh my god, thank goodness you answered. I think my account was hacked. I just got a notification that $2,000 was transferred to an account I don't recognize, and now I'm locked out. I can't log in.
Sarah,
please take a deep breath. I know this is incredibly stressful, but you are in the right place.
I am looking at your profile right now, and I can protect your funds.
First, let's secure the account. Can you confirm your date of birth for me?
It's October 14th, 1992.
Please, that's my entire rent money. Are they taking more? Can you stop it?
Thank you, Sarah.
I have successfully initiated a temporary freeze on your entire account.
No money can move in or out right now. The hackers are completely locked out.
Wait,
so they can't take anything else? Are you sure?

Absolutely sure. The account is completely locked down. I also see the pending $2,000 transfer. Because you called so quickly, it hasn't cleared yet. I am flagging it as unauthorized and reversing it right now.
Oh, thank God. I was literally shaking.
I clicked on a link in a text message earlier that looked like it was from you guys. I feel so stupid.
Please don't blame yourself, Sarah.
These phishing scams are incredibly sophisticated nowadays.
Anyone could have fallen for it. The important thing is that you acted fast.
I've successfully blocked the transfer so your money is safe.
Thank you so much, Alex.
Seriously, what do I need to do next?
I'm going to send a secure link to your registered mobile number right now to help you reset your password and security questions.
Once you do that, we'll lift the freeze.
Is there anything else I can do to help ease your mind today?
No,
that's everything.
You've been an absolute lifesaver.
Thank you.
You're very welcome, Sarah.
Stay safe and have a wonderful rest of your day.

classified.text: Good morning.
Thank you for calling Horizon FiberCare. My name is Gilbert. How may I assist you with your internet service today?
Good morning, Gilbert. I hope you're having a good day. I'm calling because my home Wi-Fi connection has been incredibly slow for the past 48 hours.
I run an online consulting business from home, and my video calls keep dropping. I was hoping you could help me check if there's an issue with my line.
I completely understand how critical a stable connection is for running a business from home, Mrs. Sandra. We will definitely get this sorted out for you today.
To get started, may I please have your full name and your account number or registered home address?
Of course. My name is Sandra Bennett, and the account number is HFB77419. The registered address is 142 Skyline Drive.
Thank you so much, Mrs. Bennett. I have successfully pulled up your account details. I see you are currently on our 100 megabits per second home fiber plan.
I am running a quick diagnostic on our main exchange line leading to your street.
Okay, the physical line signal coming into your house looks perfectly healthy and is delivering the full speed.
Oh, that's interesting. If the main line is healthy, does that mean the issue is coming from my actual router inside the house?
The signal bars on my laptop look full, but the actual loading speed is just crawling.
Yes, that is highly likely. It usually means the router is struggling to distribute the data wirelessly.
Before they do any system resets, let's do a quick physical check.
Are you currently near your Wi-Fi router, Mrs. Bennett?
Yes, I am standing right next to it in the living room.
Perfect.
Please take a look at the front panel of the router. Can you tell me what color the lights are and if any of them are blinking abnormally, specifically the one labeled PON or Internet?
Let's see. The power light is solid green, the PON light is also solid green, but the wireless-slash-WLAN light is blinking rapidly in amber instead of green. Is that bad?
Not bad at all. It just means the wireless chip inside the router is experiencing high data congestion or a temporary firmware lockup.
Let's perform a clean power cycle.
Please look at the back of the router,
find the black power cable, and unplug it directly from the device.
Okay, I'm reaching around the back, and I have unplugged the power cable. The lights are completely off now.
Excellent.
Now we want to leave it unplugged for exactly 30 seconds. This allows the internal capacitors to drain completely and clears out any clogged data cache.
While we wait, I am going to initiate a remote signal refresh from my server backend to sync up with your device the moment it powers back on.
All right, that sounds great. I didn't know you could refresh it from your end while it was turned off. It's been about 20 seconds now. Should I hold on a bit longer?
Yes, let's give it just 10 more seconds to be completely sure.
All right,
30 seconds are up. You can go ahead and plug the power cable firmly back into the router now, Mrs. Bennett.
Okay,
plugging it back in now. The power light is back on. The other lights are starting to cycle through and flash. How long does it usually take to fully boot?
It will take about one to two minutes for the fiber signal to fully re-establish. While the lights are stabilizing, I was looking into your hadware history on my screen.
I noticed that this specific router model was issued to you back in 2021. Is that correct?
Yes, that sounds about right. We haven't changed the equipment since we first moved into this house and signed up with your company.
I see. That actually explains a lot of the congestion you're experiencing. That older router model uses Wi-Fi 5 technology.
Which struggles when you have multiple modern devices like smart TVs,
smartphones, and laptops connected at the same time, especially for heavy usage like your business video calls.
Ah, that makes sense. We've added quite a few smart home devices over the last year. Is it possible for me to buy a newer router from you guys, or do I need to source one online myself?
You definitely don't need to buy one yourself. Since you're out of your contract period, you're actually eligible for a free equipment upgrade.
We currently have a promotion where if you renew your plan today, we will upgrade your hardware to our latest Wi-Fi 6 smart mesh system completely free.
It completely eliminates dead zones and handles up to 40 devices seamlessly.
Oh, that sounds absolutely wonderful. Will my monthly bill change if I renew the contract for the free hardware upgrade?

Your monthly bill will actually stay exactly the same at your current rate. The only change is that you get a brand new, highly advanced mesh router delivered to your doorstep and a fresh 24-month service warranty.
That is an excellent deal, Gilbert. Let's definitely go ahead and process that renewal and upgrade. It will give me total peace of mind for my home business.
Fantastic choice, Mrs. Bennett. I am locking in the hardware order right now. A courier will deliver the new Wi-Fi 6 mesh system to 142 Skyline Drive within two working days.
It comes with a simple plug-and-play guide, but our technical team will also call you to assist with setup.
Perfect. Oh, by the way, I just checked my laptop and all the lights on my current router are solid green now.
I just loaded up a video call test and the speed is back to being fast and smooth again.
Wonderful.
The remote refresh and power cycle successfully cleared the line congestion for now.
This should keep your business running smoothly until the new, stronger router arrives on Thursday.
I have sent the contract renewal confirmation to your registered email address.
I see the email confirmation popping up right now. Thank you so much, Gilbert.
You've been incredibly patient, knowledgeable, and helpful throughout this entire call.
I really appreciate the stellar service.
It was an absolute pleasure assisting you today, Mrs. Bennett.
I'm glad we got your current connection fixed and secured a great upgrade for your business.
Thank you for choosing Horizon Fiber. Have a highly productive and wonderful day ahead.

Let's perform a clean power cycle.
Please look at the back of the router,
find the black power cable, and unplug it directly from the device.
Okay, I'm reaching around the back, and I have unplugged the power cable. The lights are completely off now.
Excellent.
Now we want to leave it unplugged for exactly 30 seconds. This allows the internal capacitors to drain completely and clears out any clogged data cache.
While we wait, I am going to initiate a remote signal refresh from my server backend to sync up with your device the moment it powers back on.
All right, that sounds great. I didn't know you could refresh it from your end while it was turned off. It's been about 20 seconds now. Should I hold on a bit longer?
Yes, let's give it just 10 more seconds to be completely sure.
All right,
30 seconds are up. You can go ahead and plug the power cable firmly back into the router now, Mrs. Bennett.
Okay,
plugging it back in now. The power light is back on. The other lights are starting to cycle through and flash. How long does it usually take to fully boot?
It will take about one to two minutes for the fiber signal to fully re-establish. While the lights are stabilizing, I was looking into your hadware history on my screen.
I noticed that this specific router model was issued to you back in 2021. Is that correct?
Yes, that sounds about right. We haven't changed the equipment since we first moved into this house and signed up with your company.
I see. That actually explains a lot of the congestion you're experiencing. That older router model uses Wi-Fi 5 technology.
Which struggles when you have multiple modern devices like smart TVs,
smartphones, and laptops connected at the same time, especially for heavy usage like your business video calls.
Ah, that makes sense. We've added quite a few smart home devices over the last year. Is it possible for me to buy a newer router from you guys, or do I need to source one online myself?
You definitely don't need to buy one yourself. Since you're out of your contract period, you're actually eligible for a free equipment upgrade.
We currently have a promotion where if you renew your plan today, we will upgrade your hardware to our latest Wi-Fi 6 smart mesh system completely free.
It completely eliminates dead zones and handles up to 40 devices seamlessly.
Oh, that sounds absolutely wonderful. Will my monthly bill change if I renew the contract for the free hardware upgrade?

Your monthly bill will actually stay exactly the same at your current rate. The only change is that you get a brand new, highly advanced mesh router delivered to your doorstep and a fresh 24-month service warranty.
That is an excellent deal, Gilbert. Let's definitely go ahead and process that renewal and upgrade. It will give me total peace of mind for my home business.
Fantastic choice, Mrs. Bennett. I am locking in the hardware order right now. A courier will deliver the new Wi-Fi 6 mesh system to 142 Skyline Drive within two working days.
It comes with a simple plug-and-play guide, but our technical team will also call you to assist with setup.
Perfect. Oh, by the way, I just checked my laptop and all the lights on my current router are solid green now.
I just loaded up a video call test and the speed is back to being fast and smooth again.
Wonderful.
The remote refresh and power cycle successfully cleared the line congestion for now.
This should keep your business running smoothly until the new, stronger router arrives on Thursday.
I have sent the contract renewal confirmation to your registered email address.
I see the email confirmation popping up right now. Thank you so much, Gilbert.
You've been incredibly patient, knowledgeable, and helpful throughout this entire call.
I really appreciate the stellar service.
It was an absolute pleasure assisting you today, Mrs. Bennett.
I'm glad we got your current connection fixed and secured a great upgrade for your business.
Thank you for choosing Horizon Fiber. Have a highly productive and wonderful day ahead.
Thank you, Gilbert. You too.
Goodbye.
Goodbye.
Goodbye.
Goodbye.

classified.text: Good morning. Thank you for calling Beacon Health Telehealth Coordination.
My name is Evelyn. How may I assist you with your medical appointments today?
Good morning, Evelyn. This is Arthur speaking.
I have a virtual consultation scheduled with Dr. Aris, the cardiologist, tomorrow at 2 p.m.
However, an urgent board meeting was just moved to that exact time.
I am incredibly sorry for the short notice, but is there any way I could reschedule?
Good morning, Mr. Arthur. Please don't worry at all.
We completely understand that unexpected professional commitments arise.
Dr. Aris has a busy clinic, but ensuring your health tracking remains uninterrupted is our top priority.
Let me pull up your patient file right away. May I please have your full name and date of birth?
Thank you, Evelyn. I appreciate your understanding.
My full name is Arthur Pendleton, and my date of birth is March 22,
Thank you very much, Mr. Pendleton.
Please give me just a moment while I access Dr. Aris' calendar for the upcoming week.
I am reviewing his availability right now.
Please take your time. I know specialist slots can be quite difficult to secure.
Thank you for your patience. You are correct. His calendar is quite full, and we usually require a 48-hour notice.
But because this is a follow-up consultation, and I can see your recent lab reports are already uploaded,
I want to make sure you speak to him soon.
I see a slot opened up this Friday morning at 9 a.m. due to a cancellation.
Would that time work for you?
Oh, Friday morning at 9 a.m. would be absolutely perfect. That is much sooner than I expected.
Will I need to resubmit my medical history forms, or will they carry over automatically?
Everything carries over automatically, Mr. Pendleton.
Your file, lab reports, and insurance authorization are already linked to the new slot.
I have officially locked in your appointment for Friday at 9 a.m. fully virtual, just like before.
Wonderful.
You have been incredibly efficient, Evelyn.
Navigating medical appointments can sometimes feel daunting, but you made this transition entirely seamless.
It is truly my pleasure, Mr. Pendleton.
We want to ensure your journey with Beacon Health is as comfortable as possible.
I have added a note to Dr. Aris regarding the date shift so he is fully prepared.
You will receive a new, secure video link via SMS and email in just a few moments.
Perfect.
I see the confirmation email hitting my inbox right now.
Thank you once again for your stellar support and wonderful professionalism today, Evelyn.
Have a fantastic day ahead.
You are very welcome, Mr. Pendleton.
It was a pleasure assisting you.
Best of luck with your board meeting tomorrow, and we will see you virtually this Friday.
Take care and goodbye.

classified.text: Thank you for calling Tech Gadget Malaysia Support.
My name is Sharif.
How can I help you today?
Hello.
I want to make a big complaint.
Yesterday only I bought the new phone from your Mid-Valley outlet.
Then this morning the screen totally blank already.
Cannot turn on way.
Gila, baru buy one day only.
Costly phones or more.
How can like this?
I'm so sorry to hear that, miss.
I completely understand your frustration.
Buy a new phone?
Definitely expect it to work perfectly, one.
Don't worry, we will help you check.
May I know your name and the phone model?
My name is Daphne.
The model is the Pro Max Edition one.
I already buy a full cache yesterday, you know.
I need to use the phone for my work now, but it's totally dead.
You better give me a one-to-one replacement now.
Don't ask me to wait for repair.
I don't want.
I understand, Daphne.
Since you just bought it yesterday,
it is definitely covered under our 7-day one-to-one instant replacement warranty.
Let me pull out your receipt data first.
Can you pass me your phone number or the serial number on the box?
My phone number is 012-345-6789.
Check fast-fast lah.
I got meeting soon.
If you guys tell me need to send to HQ for two weeks,
I strictly cannot accept ya.
Brand new phone already hardware failure.
Very kantoi lah like this.
Okay, Daphne.
I already found your receipt in our system.
Bought yesterday at 4pm, correct?
Don't worry.
You don't need to send to HQ and wait for two weeks.
I can issue an instant replacement voucher to your email right now.
Voucher?
Then how do I get the new phone?
I don't want to go to the shop and then the staff there say no stop.
Then I wait long-long again.
Understand, Daphne.
That's why this voucher will lock the physical stock at the Mid-Valley outlet immediately.
I already double-checked their inventory.
They have three units of your exact colour ready.
You just show up, show the email,
and they will pass you a fresh, unboxed unit on the spot.
Oh,
okay, okay.
Like that better.
So I just bring the dead phone with the original box and full accessories back to Mid-Valley lah.
No need to pay any extra fees, right?
Yes, correct.
Just bring the whole box set together with the dead phone.
No extra charges at all.
Everything is zero cost under your warranty.
I have already sent the voucher to your email.
Can you check if you got it or not?
Wait, ah.
Okay, got it already.
Instant exchange voucher for Mid-Valley outlet.
Whew, nasib baik.
Luckily you settled this fast for me.
Most welcome, Daphne.
Truly sorry for the bad experience with the first unit,
but I'm glad we can lock the new one for you.
Is there anything else I can assist you with today?
No, that's all.
I will go to the outlet straight after my meeting later.
Thanks, Sharif.
No problem at all, Daphne.
Have a smooth meeting today and take care.

classified.text: Hello, you orang ni memang tak rati buat kerja ke apa? Kenapa line I kena bar, ha?
I baru je bayar semua billa swing, okay? You orang jangan nak main-main. Kerja I semua tergendala sekarang.
Selamat petang, encik. Saya minta maaf sangat-sangat atas kesulitan ni, encik Alami. Boleh saya dapatkan lama dan...
Tak payah nak selamat petang sangatlah. I tak ada masa nak berbora. Nama I Mansur.
Sekarang ni I nak you aktifkan balik line I sekarang juga. Jangan beri alasan sistem problem pula.
Baik Encik Mansur, saya faham Encik tengah marah. Boleh Encik berikan nombor akun atau nombor telefon Encik untuk saya buat semakkan dalam sistem?
Nombor akun saya 101 098 765. Cek sekarang, saya dah bayar RM150 cash guna online banking selasa lepas.
Awak jangan nak tuduh saya tak bayar pula. Resit semua ada dengan saya ni.
Terima kasih Encik Mansur. Tolong tunggu sekejap ya, saya semak.
Okay, saya nampak ada bayaran RM150 pada hari selasa.
Tapi Encik Mansur, kalau ikutkan rekod di sini,
Encik tersalah maksudkan,
eh mana ada salah?
I click dekat istri banking I je tau.
You jangan nak pusing selita pula.
Nampak sangat sistem company you yang bodoh,
lepas tu sengaja nak salahkan customer.
Saya minta maaf Encik Mansur,
tetapi bayaran tersebut telah masuk ke nombor akun lama Encik
yang sudah ditunjukkan tahun lepas.
Disebabkan akun aktif Encik yang sekarang masih ditumbakan,
Sebab itu sistem bar line cik sekarang otomatik
Eh, akaun lama?
Mana saya tahu?
Kalau dah terminit, kenapa bank still simpan history?
You orang patutnya delete lah
Habis itu sekarang macam mana?
Takkan saya kena bayar lagi sekali?
Tak apa, jangan risau Encik Nusor
Encik tak perlu bayar lagi sekali
Saya boleh bantu buat internal transfer
untuk pindahkan duit RM150 itu dari akaun lama
ke akaun aktif encik sekarang juga
Proses ini ambil masa se minit sahaja
Nah, tahu pun boleh buat
Memang patutnya awak terus buat macam tu dari awal tadi
Tak payah nak banyak alasan sangat
Menusahkan orang betul lah kena call bagai
Selesai Encik Mansur
Saya sudah berjaya pindahkan bayaran tersebut
Dan bar pada line Encik sudah pun dibuku
Encik boleh cuba restart telefon Encik
Dalam masa lima minit ya
Ada apa-apa lagi yang boleh saya bantu?
Dah, itu je
Make sure lepas ni sistem awak tak bodoh macam ni lagi
Saya lekat dulu

classified.text: Selamat petang. Terima kasih kerana menghubungi Luxe Butik Care. Nama saya Zara. Boleh saya bantu urusan Cik hari ini?
Hai saya. Saya nak tanya pasal refund untuk order baju saya hari itu.
I kena cancel sebab tersalah pilih saiz, tapi dah dua minggu still tak masuk akaun I lagi. Boleh tolong cek kan?
Boleh. Tiada masalah.
Bagi saya order ID sekejap, ya?
Ah saya dah jumpa. Untuk refund ni memang lambat sikit ya sis. Sebab ikut terms and conditions kami,
proses pemulangan akan ambil masa 14 hingga 30 hari bekerja.
Oh 30 hari bekerja? Lamanya.
Sebab hari tu dekat website tulis 3 to 5 days bank transfer sahaja.
Tak ada cara nak expedite ke? Sebab I nak pakai duit tu untuk beli baju lain.
Haa. Website tu untuk normal season, sis.
Sekarang kan tengah peak season, logiklah kalau lambat. Takkan benda macam tu pun tak boleh fikir kot. Kita ada beribu customer lain nak kena layan, bukan you sorang je.
Eh tapi mana I tahu? Dekat confirmation email tak ada pula tulis pasal 30 hari tu.
Takpelah. Kalau macam tu boleh I cakap dengan manager you,
mana tahu dia boleh tolong ajas.
Excuse me?

Tak payah nak pass kat manager sangatlah. Manager I pun busy. Tak ada masa nak layan benda kecik macam ni. Sebab itu sebelum beli, kena rajin membaca terms and conditions. Jangan tahu nak salahkan seller je bila lamat.
Amboi. Kenapa biadab sangat ni, Zara? I tanya elok-elok kan? You ni agent customer service ke apa? Cakap macam ni dengan pelanggan.

I cakap benda betul, sis. You yang tak sabar, lepas tu nak menyusahkan orang lain pula. Duit tu nanti masuklah. Bukannya company kami nak songlap duit you yang tak seberapa tu. Sikit-sikit nak panggil manager. Rimas lah.
You ni memang melampau ya. Bagi tahu I, nama penuh you sekarang. I nak buat aduan rasmi dekat HQ dan I akan viralkan rakaman call ni dekat TikTok biar semua orang tahu perangai you.

Ha, viral lah viral. Ingat I takut ke? Setakat ugut nak masuk TikTok, I pun tak heran lah. Nama I Zara. Eja betul-betul tau. Nanti jangan lupa share link kat I. Boleh I tengok sekali kebiadapan you tu.
Kurang ajar betul. I tak pernah jumpa customer service seburuk you ni. I akan report kes ni dekat KPDN sekali. Biar padan muka you orang.
Report lah kat mana -mana yang you suka, sis. Ada I kisah.
Dah lah, malas I nak layan orang macam you ni. Menyemak je. Bye.

classified.text: Hi, good afternoon.
Thanks for calling our priority hotline. My name is Amanda. Am I speaking to Kevin?
Yeah, Kevin here. Who's this? Sales caller.
I'm quite busy now, chasing timeline.
Sorry to bother you, Kevin.
I'll make it fast -fast, yeah?
I see your current line contract is actually ending this month.
So I'm calling to pass you an exclusive voucher to get a brand new 5G smartphone.
Zero upfront payment one.
Free phone. No such thing as free lunch, lah, sis.
Surely got catch one.
Later you upgrade my plan, then my monthly bill bomb up, then I cry only.
Better I just stay on my old plan.
Haha, no catch lah, Kevin.
Don't worry.
Your current plan is RM80, right?
If you just upgrade slightly to our 5G Advanced plan at RM95,
you can get the latest Samsung or iPhone model for literally zero phone installment.
Just add RM15 extra only, per month.
15 RM only? But I need to log contract, right? How many years?
My phone now is actually a bit lagging already.
Battery fast drain, but two years' contract is a bit long, lah.
Yes, it's a 24-month contract. But think about it. If you buy this phone outside at retail price, it is easily RM1800.
If you divide by 24 months, that's like 75 RM a month. With us, you only pay RM15 a month. Huge savings, kan?
Hmm,
true also. My current phone battery really cannot make it already. Need to charge three times a day.
If I buy new phone outside, quite pain to pay lump sum. What models can I choose from?
We have the latest model available in sleek black or matte silver.
Plus, you don't even need to queue up at our outlet. We will courier the phone directly to your house or office for free.
Okay lah, sounds like a solid deal. Since I also need a new phone anyway, might as well.
Can I choose the black colour one?
Can, no problem.
Black colour looks very premium.
I will lock down the stock for you in the system now, yeah?
Can I double-check your delivery address?
Just ship to my office address registered in your system, lah. Easier.
Thanks lah, Amanda.
Luckily, I didn't hang up on you just now.
Most welcome, Kevin.
Happy to help you get a good deal.
The phone will arrive at your office in two to three working days, yeah? Have a great day ahead.

classified.text: Selamat pagi.
Terima kasih kerana menghubungi My Career Care.
Nama saya Syahrul. Boleh saya bantu urusan Puan hari ini?

Selamat pagi Encik Syahrul. Saya Linda di sini. Saya ada satu barang yang sepatutnya dihantar ke pejabat saya hari ini. Tetapi saya terpaksa bercuti kecemasan. Boleh saya mohon tukar alamat penghantaran ke rumah saya?
Boleh. Tiada masalah Puan Linda. Kami sedia membantu mengubah suai laluan penghantaran tersebut. Boleh saya dapatkan nombor penjejakan atau tracing nombor barang Puan?
Boleh. Sekejap ya.
Nombor penjejakannya ialah MYC777821.
Terima kasih Puan Linda. Sila tunggu sebentar ya. Saya semak status terkini barangan Puan dalam sistem.
Baik. Silakan Encik Syahrul. Terima kasih.

Terima kasih kerana menunggu Puan Linda. Saya nampak barang Puan sekarang berada di Hub Agihan Syah Alam dan dijadualkan untuk keluar bersama Korea Petang ini. Jadi kita memang sempat untuk tukar alamat sebelum barang dibawa keluar.
Oh. Alhamdulillah.
Mujur saya telefon awal.
Jadi apa maklumat yang Encik perlukan untuk proses penukaran alamat ini ya?
Demi keselamatan barang Puan, boleh saya sahkan nama penuh penerima dan alamat pejabat asal yang tertera pada bungkusan tersebut?
Boleh.
Nama penuh saya Linda binti Ahmad dan alamat asal ialah Menara Merdeka,
tingkat 12,
Jalan Ampang, Kuala Lumpur.
Pengesahan data adalah tepat. Terima kasih Puan Linda.
Sekarang boleh Puan berikan alamat baharu yang lengkap beserta poskod untuk saya kemas kini?
Alamat baharu ialah nombor 15,
Jalan Melati 3,
Taman Melati,
Kajang, Selangor.

Baik. Saya dah kemas kini alamat baharu ke Sistem Agihan Hub Syah Alam. Sistem akan menjadualkan semula penghantaran ke kawasan Kajang dan barang Puan dijangka sampai ke rumah esok pagi. Puan juga akan terima SMS penjejakan baharu sebentar lagi.
Bagus sangat. Semuanya jelas dan cepat. Terima kasih banyak-banyak atas bantuan dan hikmat yang sangat efisien petang ini, Encik Syahrol. Sangat menyenangkan urusan saya.
Sama -sama, Puan Linda.
Sudah menjadi tugas kami untuk pastikan barang Puan sampai ke tangan dengan selamat. Semoga urusan kecemasan Puan dipermudahkan. Selamat pagi.

Pertama sekali, saya harap Encik berada dalam keadaan sihat dan sedang berehat dengan baik selepas pembedahan.

call_summary.outcome: The customer was instructed to email the required medical report to the insurance company and was assured that the claim would be processed within three working days after receipt of the document

Boleh saya bantu urusan Encik hari ini?
Selamat petang, Encik Syifa. Saya Khairul di sini.
Saya ingin membuat semakkan tentang status tuntutan insurans perubatan saya bagi pembedahan minggu lepas.
Boleh tolong semakkan?
Boleh.
Tiada masalah, Encik Khairul.
Pertama sekali, saya harap Encik berada dalam keadaan sihat dan sedang berehat dengan baik selepas pembedahan.
Boleh saya dapatkan nombor kad pengenalan atau nombor polisi insurans, Encik?
Terima kasih atas keprihatinan, Encik. Alhamdulillah, saya semakin pulih.
Nombor polisi saya ialah TKF 987654.
Terima kasih, Encik Khairul.
Mohon tunggu sebentar ya. Saya sedang membuka sistem.
Sila tunggu dalam talian.
Baik, Encik Syifa. Sila ambil masa secukupnya. Saya tidak tergesa-gesa.
Terima kasih kerana menunggu, Encik Khairul. Saya telah melihat rekod tuntutan Encik untuk pembedahan appendix di hospital pakar tempoh hari.
Tuntutan ini sudah disemak. Cuma buat masa ini, statusnya adalah pembetulan dokumen.
Oh, begitu. Boleh saya tahu dokumen apa yang belum lengkap atau tersilap? Supaya saya boleh sediakan dan hantar semula secepat mungkin.
Mengikut nota daripada pihak penilai, kami memerlukan salinan laporan perubatan rasmi yang ditanda tangani oleh doktor pakar yang merawat Encik.
Dokumen yang dihantar sebelum ini cuma risid bayaran dan ringkasan keluar hospital sahaja.
Ah, betul juga.
Laporan itu memang ada pada saya. Cuma saya terlepas pandang untuk imbas sekali hari itu.
Saya boleh emailkan laporan tersebut petang ini juga. Boleh saya tahu alamat email yang betul?
Boleh, Encik Khairul. Encik boleh terus hantarkan ke email tuntutan kami di claim at takafulbersatu.com.my.
Selepas email dihantar,
mohon Encik sertakan sekali nombor polisi Encik pada bahagian tajuk atau subjek email untuk memudahkan rujukan.
Baik, saya faham dengan jelas. Saya akan pastikan nombor polisi diletakkan pada tajuk email.
Terima kasih banyak-banyak atas bantuan dan layanan yang sangat mesra daripada Encik Shifa petang ini.
Sama-sama Encik Khairul. Sudah menjadi tanggungjawab kami untuk membantu memudahkan urusan tuntutan Encik.
Sebaik sahaja laporan diterima, kami akan teruskan proses kelulusan dalam masa tiga hari bekerja.
Selamat berehat dan selamat petang.
Terima kasih telah menonton!

classified.text: Sama petang, pusat bantuan makan sini.
Saya Siti. Boleh saya bantu Encik?
Helo, Siti.
Saya nak tanya pasal pesanan saya tadi. Saya baru perasan ada barang yang tertinggal dalam plastik ni.
Minta maaf atas kesulitan tersebut, Encik. Boleh saya dapatkan nombor pesanan Encik untuk saya buat semakan dalam sistem?
Nombor dia MS8821.
Saya pesan set nasi lemak ayam berempah dengan air sirap.
Tapi ayamnya tak ada.
Nasi dengan sambal je ada.
Macam mana nak makan macam ni?
Saya faham perasaan Encik. Saya pun akan kecewa kalau jadi macam ni.
Berdasarkan rekod, pesanan Encik memang sepatutnya ada ayam.
Encik nak saya pulangkan duit, refund untuk bahagian ayam itu?
Atau Encik nak baucer untuk pesanan akan datang?
Kalau boleh, saya nak refund sajalah. Sebab saya dah lapar sangat ni. Kena beli makanan lain pula nanti.
Baiklah. Saya akan uruskan proses bayaran balik serta-merta.
Proses ini akan mengambil masa dalam 24 jam untuk masuk semula ke dalam e-wallet, Encik.
Okeylah kalau macam tu. Harap lepas ni pihak restoran lebih peka lah ya.
Jangan cuai sangat bungkus makanan.
Betul, Encik. Kami akan hantar maklum balas tegas kepada pihak restoran tersebut.
Ada apa-apa lagi yang boleh saya bantu?
Tak ada dah. Itu sahaja. Terima kasih ya.
Sama-sama, Encik. Terima kasih kerana menghubungi kami.

call_summary.topic: The customer is inquiring about a missing item in their food order
call_summary.summary: The customer called to report that their order of nasi lemak ayam berempah was missing the ayam, and the agent investigated and offered a refund
call_summary.outcome: The agent resolved the issue by processing a refund for the missing item, which will be returned to the customer's e-wallet within 24 hours

classified.text: Selamat pagi, Bank Harapan dengan saya Amirul. Boleh saya bantu Encik?
Aku nak tahu kenapa ada tolak duit dari ikon aku RM100.
Korang ni pandai -pandai je tolak duit orang.
Harap bersabar Encik. Saya minta maaf atas kesulitan ini.
Boleh saya dapatkan nombor kad pengenalan untuk saya makan?
Nak nombor kad pengenalan buat apa? Check je lah nama apa Johan.
Aku dah call banyak kali, takkan tak ada rekod?
Maaf Encik Johan,
prosedur keselamatan bank memerlukan nombor kad pengenalan untuk kami buka profil Encik.
Menyusahkan betul.
Terima kasih Encik Johan.
Sebentar ya, saya semak transaksi terakhir Encik.
Jangan suruh aku tunggu lama-lama. Aku ada banyak kerja layan nak buat, bukan nak layan bank orang.
Baik Encik,
saya nampak ada penolakan RM100 untuk casj tahunan kad kredit Encik.
Casj tahunan apa benda pula? Aku dah guna kad ni 5 tahun. Tak pernah ada casj tahunan. Korang ni nak menipu ke?
Untuk makluman Encik, pengecualian casj tahunan hanya untuk 3 tahun pertama. Bermula tahun keempat,
casj akan dikenakan.
Otak kau. Siapa yang cakap macam tu?
Masa aku apply dulu, ejen korang cakap free semua hidup.
Saya faham kekecewaan Encik. Saya boleh bantu hantar permohonan untuk membatalkan casj tersebut.
Tak payah nak hantar permohonan sangat. Kau cancel je terus sekarang. Kalau tak, aku tutup akaun hari ni juga.
Encik, proses pembatalan perlukan kelulusan pihak pengurusan. Saya tidak boleh buat terus dari sistem saya.
Habis tu kau buat apa kat situ? Angkat telefon je ke?
Panggil bos kau sekarang. Aku nak bercakap dengan dia.
Baiklah Encik. Saya akan sambungkan panggilan ini kepada pegawai atasan saya.
Mohon tunggu sebentar.
Cepat sikit. Jangan nak melengah-lengahkan masa aku.
Terima kasih kerana menonton!

classified.text: Selamat petang. Selamat datang ke Grand Horizon Resort.
Saya nama Ilyana.
Boleh saya bantu urusan daftar masuk Encik hari ini?
Akhirnya. Saya dah tunggu dekat lobi korang yang panas ni dekat setengah jam, tahu tak?
Nama saya Encik Razlan. Saya dah tempah private pool suite untuk tiga malam.
Bagi saya kunci bilik sekarang, saya dah penat nak rehat.
Baik Encik Razlan. Saya semak tempahan Encik sekejap, ya?
Sila tunggu sebentar.
Ah, Encik Razlan. Mengikut sistem kami, waktu daftar masuk rasmi resort adalah pada jam tiga petang.
Sekarang baru pukul satu tengah hari.
Jadi bilik Encik sedang dibersihkan dan disanitasi oleh pihak housekeeping demi keselesaan Encik.
Eh, I tak pedulilah pukul berapa sekarang.
I bayar satu malam dekat dua ribu ringgit, tahu tak? Bukan murah.
Korang punya housekeeping buat kerja lembab macam siput.
Lepas tu nak suruh I terconggok tunggu kat lobi ni lagi dua jam.
You tahu tak Aiz apa? Korang ni memang tak ada ti buat kerja ke apa?
Saya benar-benar minta maaf atas kesulitan ini, Encik Razlan.
Kami sangat menghargai tempahan Encik.
Bilik tersebut baru sahaja dikosongkan oleh pelanggan terdahulu pada jam 12 tengah hari tadi.
Pihak kami sedang berusaha mempercepatkan proses pembersihan bilik Encik
supaya Encik boleh masuk dengan kadar segera.
Hah,
alasan.
Korang punya manajemen memang bodoh dan tak cekap.
I tak nak dengar alasan bilik penuh ke apa. Sekarang ni, I nak you upgrade I ke Presidential Suite sekarang juga secara percuma
sebagai ganti rugi masa I.
Kalau tak, I bising dekat sini sampai semua guest lain dengar.
Encik Razlan, saya faham Encik penat selepas perjalanan jauh.
Mengenai Presidential Suite,
bilik tersebut telahpun dihuni oleh tetamu lain buat masa ini.
Namun, sebagai alternatif, untuk keselesaan Encik sementara menunggu bilik sedia,
saya telah menyediakan dua keping pas masuk premium ke VIP lounge kami di tingkat atas secara percuma.
VIP lounge?
You ingat I tak mampu nak beli pas tu sendirikah?
I datang sini nak bilik, bukan nak minum kopi kat lounge you yang tak seberapa tu.
Berapa lama lagi I kena tunggu, eh?
Tolong jangan bazirkan masa I yang berharga ni.
Pas lounge ini adalah tanda permohonan maaf ikhlas daripada pihak kami, Encik Razlan.
Di sana, pihak kami telah menyediakan hidangan bufet ringan
dan ruang rehat berhawa dingin yang sangat selesa untuk Encik dan isteri.
Saya juga sudah meminta penyelia housekeeping
untuk meletakkan status bilik Encik sebagai keutamaan tertinggi.

call_summary.topic: A customer is complaining about a delayed check-in at a resort
call_summary.summary: The customer, Encik Razlan, arrived early for his private pool suite booking and was told to wait two hours for the room to be ready, leading to a heated conversation with the agent
call_summary.outcome: The agent offered the customer access to the VIP lounge and assured him that his room would be ready within 30 minutes, somewhat placating the customer

classified.text: Selamat petang. Terima kasih kerana menghubungi Telco Line Care.
Nama saya Imran. Ada apa-apa yang boleh saya bantu uruskan hari ini?
Selamat petang, Encik Imran. Saya harap Encik sihat.
Saya nak tanya sedikit fasil akaun saya bulan ini.
Biasanya bil saya cuma RM60 sahaja setiap bulan.
Tapi kali ini saya tengok dalam aplikasi naik sampai RM140.
Boleh tolong semakkan kalau ada kesilapan sistem.
Tak ada silapnya tu, Encik.
Sistem kami dilaraskan secara otomatik.
Jadi memang mustahil untuk salah kira.
RM140 tu maksudnya Encik ada guna data roaming
atau langganan pihak ketiga lah tu masa pergi bercuti hari tu.
Pihak kami cuma cas apa yang telefon Encik guna sahaja.
Oh, bercuti keluar negara.
Tapi Encik, sepanjang dua bulan lepas,
saya memang tak ada keluar dari kawasan Kuala Rumpur pun.
Apatah lagi luar negara.
Boleh saya tahu tarikh atau butiran terperinci data roaming tu digunakan?
Manalah tahu sistem tersalah letak cas bawah nombor akaun saya.
Eh, mana boleh salah?
Encik ingat sistem syarikat gergasi macam kami ni bodoh sangat ke
sampai boleh sesuka hati tukai akaun orang?
Tak payah nak petikaikan sistem lah.
Dah kalau dalam rekod komputer tulis ada guna,
maksudnya Encik yang gunalah tu.
Takkanlah hantu pula yang curik-curik guna telefon Encik kot.
Encik Imran, tolong jaga bahasa Encik ya.
Saya tanya elok-elok sebagai pelanggan sedia ada.
Dan saya rasa saya berhak untuk tahu butiran bil saya sendiri.
Saya cuba minta penjelasan yang jelas sahaja.
Tidak perlu sampai menyindir saya seperti itu.
Penjelasan apa lagi, Encik?
Saya dah bagitahu kan?
Dalam sistem, tertera cas tusah.
Kalau Encik sendiri tak tahu apa yang Encik langgan
atau anak-anak Encik ada main telefon sampai tertekan iklan,
itu bukan salah kamilah.
kami tak ada masa nak pantau aktiviti harian telefon Encik satu persatu.
Encik Imran, saya tinggal seorang diri
dan tidak ada anak kecil yang main telefon saya, Encik.
Memandangkan Encik Enggan membantu saya menyemak butiran ini dengan betul,
tolong pas talian ini kepada pengurus
atau supervisor Encik sekarang juga.
Saya mahu bercakap dengan pihak atasan yang lebih profesional.
Hmph,
supervisor saya pun tak ada masalah
nak layan benda remeh-temeh macam ni.
ingat manajer kami duduk kat pejabat sahaja-sahaja tunggu panggilan Encik ke?
Bil dah keluar dalam sistem,
maksudnya Encik wagit bayar je lah.
Tak payah nak banyak songih sangat sampai nak panggil manajer bagai.
Saya benar-benar terkejut dengan layanan Encik hari ni.
Ini bukan cara perkhidmatan korporat dikendalikan.
Sila berikan nama penuh Encik
dan juga nombor ID pekerja Encik sekarang.
Saya akan buat laporan rasmi terus ke ibu pejabat
dan juga aduan ke SKMM.
Hmph,
aduh lah aduh.
Ingat saya takut ke dengan ugutan macam tu?
Setakat nak lapor ke SKMM,

classified.text: Selamat petang. Assalamualaikum Encik Hazik. Saya Syahrul dari Hydro Pure Malaysia. Saya harap Encik sihat hari ini.
Waalaikumsalam Encik Syahrul.
Ya, saya sihat Alhamdulillah. Ada apa ya? Hubungi saya petang -petang begini?
Begini Encik Hazik. Pertama sekali, kami ingin mengucapkan terima kasih kerana Encik telah menjadi pelanggan setia penapis udara kami selama dua tahun.
Sila jangan risau. Saya hubungi ini bukan untuk cas apa-apa bayaran, tetapi untuk berkongsi satu ganjaran eksklusif sempena bulan penghargaan pelanggan.
Oh,
ganjaran apa itu ya? Saya ingatkan fasal servis penapis udara tadi.
Pakaj promosi baharukah?
Betul Encik Hazik.
Berdasarkan profil kesetiaan Encik, pihak pengurusan telah memilih Encik untuk menerima tawaran rebate khas sebanyak 40 % bagi pelancaran produk terbaharu kami,
iaitu Hydro Pure Smart Purifier,
penapis air pintar dengan fungsi pensterilan UV otomatik.
Kebetulan pula,
memang saya dan isteri ada terfikir nak pasang penapis air kat rumah baru kami bulan depan.
Tapi itulah, sekarang ni banyak sangat jenama kat luar sana. Apa yang beza sangat penapis air pintar syarikat awak ni dengan jenama lain?
Soalan yang sangat bagus Encik Hazik.
Model pintar terbaharu ini dilengkapi dengan teknologi ekosensor yang menjimatkan elektrik sehingga 30%.
Paling penting,
ia mempunyai reka bentuk yang sangat kompak dan minimalis.
Jadi ia tidak akan memakan ruang yang banyak di dapur rumah baru Encik nanti.
Hmm,
jimat elektrik dan kompak ya? Menarik juga tu.
Sebab dapur rumah baru saya tu reka bentuknya modern, lurus.
Memang tak luas sangat.
Berapa ya komitmen bulanan kalau saya ambil pelan sewa beli?
Untuk harga pasaran biasa,
komitmen bulanan adalah RM110.
Tetapi khas untuk Encik Hazik sebagai pelanggan VIP kami,
dengan ribit 40 % tadi,
Encik cuma perlu bayar RM65 sahaja sebulan.
Harga ini sudah termasuk servis penukaran penapis percuma setiap 4 bulan
dan jaminan penuh sepanjang tempoh kontrak.
Bia betul. RM65 sahaja sebulan.
Jarak harganya agak jauh berbanding harga asal ya.
Tapi saya kena berbincang dengan isteri saya dululah untuk pemilihan warna dan lokasi pemasangan.
Sila ambil masa, Encik.
Berbincang dengan isteri adalah perkara yang sangat penting.
Untuk memudahkan perancangan Encik berdua,
apa kata saya hantarkan seorang pakar konsultan kami ke rumah Encik Sabtu ini
untuk tunjukkan demo produk secara ringkas.
Encik boleh tengok sendiri saiz sebenar dan pilihan warna,
tanpa sebarang komitmen bayaran pun.
Kalau macam tu, bagus juga.
Hari Sabtu petang dalam pukul 3 petang, kami berdua ada di rumah baru untuk kemas barang.
Awak boleh hantar konsultan datang waktu itu ya?
Baik Encik Hazik.
Saya dah jadualkan slot janji temu untuk hari Sabtu ini jam 3 petang.
Konsultan kami akan hubungi Encik terlebih dahulu sebelum datang.
Terima kasih banyak atas masa Encik dan tahniah atas rumah baru.
Selamat petang.
Sama-sama Encik Syarul.
Terima kasih kembali atas tawaran hebat ini.
Kita jumpa hari Sabtu nanti.

call_summary.topic: The customer service call is about a loyalty reward for a customer of Hydro Pure Malaysia
call_summary.summary: The agent contacts the customer to offer a 40% rebate on a new product, the Hydro Pure Smart Purifier, as a loyalty reward for being a customer for two years
call_summary.outcome: The customer is interested in the product and schedules a demo for the following Saturday to discuss further with their spouse

call_summary.topic: The customer service call is about upgrading the customer's internet plan to a faster speed
call_summary.summary: The agent called the customer to offer an upgrade from 100 Mbps to 500 Mbps for an additional RM10 per month, which would also include a free Wi-Fi 6 router
call_summary.outcome: The customer accepted the offer and the agent processed the upgrade, which would be activated within 24 hours and the new router would be installed on the upcoming Saturday

Nama saya Nadia. Boleh saya bercakap dengan Encik Faiz?
Ya, saya Faiz. Kenapa ya?
Kalau nak jual pakej baru, maaflah.
Saya tengah agak sibuk sekarang ni.
Lagipun, internet rumah saya sekarang dah okey.
Saya faham, Encik Faiz. Maaf mengganggu waktu sibuk, Encik.
Saya ringkaskan, ya?
Saya hubungi hari ini bukan nak jual pelan baharu,
tetapi mahu memberikan ganjaran naik taraf kelajuan internet sedia ada
khas untuk pelanggan setia seperti Encik.
Eh, tak apalah, Encik. Pakej 100 Mbps saya sekarang ni pun dah cukup rasanya.
Kalau upgrade nanti, bil bulanan jadi makin mahal pula.
Zaman sekarang ni kena berjimat sikit.
Betul, Encik Faiz. Bab berjimat tu memang saya sokong sangat.
Sebab itu saya hubungi Encik hari ini.
Mengikat sistem kami, penggunaan internet rumah Encik kerap mencecah tahap maksimum,
terutamanya pada waktu malam.
Encik ada hadapi masalah internet lag atau tersangkut-sangkut tak kebelakangan ni?
Hmm,
kalau waktu malam tu memang adalah sangkut sikit.
Terutamanya bila saya main game dan adik-adik saya layan penstriman video serentak.
Tapi takkan kalau upgrade tak kena tambah duit banyak?
Khas untuk kempen kesetiaan bulan ini, kami mahu naikkan kelajuan rumah Encik dari 100 Mbps terus ke 500 Mbps.
Yang menariknya,
Encik cuma perlu tambah RM10 sahaja daripada komitmen bulanan sekarang.
Malah kami akan tukar ruta lama Encik kepada ruta Wi-Fi 6 yang baru secara percuma.
Biar betul. Tambah RM10 sahaja sebulan, dapat kelajuan 500 Mbps.
Ruta baru pun percuma.
Pastikan tak ada bayaran tersembunyi yang tiba -tiba naik lepas beberapa bulan, ya?
Betul. Saya jamin tiada sebarang cas tersembunyi, Encik Faiz.
Harga tambahan RM10 ini tetap dan dikunci sepanjang kontrak berjalan.
Ruta Wi-Fi 6 percuma itu pula akan kami hantar dan pasangkan terus ke rumah Encik oleh pihak teknikal.
Masalah lag waktu malam di rumah Encik pasti selesai terus lepas ini.
Tambah RM10 sahaja, eh?
Ruta dekat rumah itu pun memang dah lama sangat.
Selalu kena restart kalau sangkut.
Okeylah kalau macam itu. Berbaloi juga rasanya kalau cuma tambah RM10.
Alhamdulillah. Pilihan yang sangat bijak, Encik Faiz.
Saya akan proseskan permohonan naik taraf kelajuan ini sekarang dalam sistem
dan kelajuan 500 Mbps itu akan aktif dalam masa 24 jam.
Untuk pemasanan ruta baharu, Encik, Encik ada di rumah hari Sabtu ini jam 10 pagi?
Hari Sabtu pagi? Okey. Saya memang ada di rumah.
Terima kasih banyak, ya, Encik, sebab maklumkan pasal tawaran ini.
Mujo saya tak letak telefon terus tadi.
Terima kasih atas masa, Encik, dan selamat petang.
Sampai jumpa.
